metadata.name: aws-ec2-nonprod
metadata.title: Flexible EC2 Development Instance
metadata.description: Complete cost-optimized EC2 infrastructure for development, staging, and testing environments. Choose between creating a new VPC with full networking setup (subnets, internet gateway, NAT gateway, route tables, security groups) or deploying into an existing VPC. Includes EC2 instance with IAM role/profile, multiple application presets (Web Server, WordPress, MySQL, Node.js, ALB Backend, Custom), pre-configured security groups for SSH access, application traffic, database connections, and web services. Features VPC endpoints for S3 and DynamoDB, VPC Flow Logs for monitoring, and AWS Systems Manager (SSM) integration for secure instance management without SSH keys. Supports both public and private subnet deployments with optional NAT gateway for private subnet internet access. Automatically assigns appropriate security groups based on application preset (web presets get HTTP/HTTPS access, database presets get app security groups). Creates IAM roles with SSM managed policies and S3 read access for static assets. Exports instance details, IP addresses, VPC information, and connection commands for SSH and SSM access.
metadata.author: InnovativeApps

use_cases.title: Development & Testing Workloads
use_cases.description: Deploy isolated EC2 instances for application development, QA testing, and staging environments with cost-effective instance types.

use_cases.title: Web Application Hosting
use_cases.description: Host web servers, WordPress sites, or Node.js applications with pre-configured security groups and application presets.

use_cases.title: Database Development Instances
use_cases.description: Run MySQL, PostgreSQL, or other database engines for development and testing with appropriate security controls.

use_cases.title: CI/CD Build Agents
use_cases.description: Deploy dedicated build agents or Jenkins workers with SSM access and S3 integration for artifact storage.

use_cases.title: Application Backend Services
use_cases.description: Run backend APIs and microservices behind Application Load Balancers with auto-configured security groups.

features: Integrated Security Group presets for Common Ports
Secure Access via SSH or AWS Systems Manager (SSM)
S3 Integration for Static Assets & Deployment
Multiple AMI Options (Amazon Linux 2, Ubuntu, Windows)

practices: SSM integration enables secure, auditable instance access without managing SSH keys or bastion hosts
Application presets provide standardized configurations for common workloads (web servers, databases, Node.js)
VPC Flow Logs capture network traffic for troubleshooting and security analysis
User data scripts automate initial instance configuration and application deployment
CloudWatch integration through SSM agent provides centralized logging and monitoring
Security groups restrict access to only required ports based on application preset
IAM instance profiles follow least-privilege principle with SSM and S3 read-only access
VPC isolation options (public/private subnets) protect instances from direct internet exposure
SSH/RDP access limited to specified IP ranges with optional key pair authentication
SSM Session Manager provides encrypted, auditable shell access without exposing SSH ports
VPC endpoints enable private AWS service access without internet gateway traversal
Multi-AZ VPC architecture provides infrastructure redundancy for networking components
NAT gateway options ensure reliable outbound internet connectivity from private subnets
Instance status checks and automatic recovery can be enabled via AWS Systems Manager
Multiple availability zones supported for subnet placement
Note: Single-instance design suitable for dev/test; production workloads should use Auto Scaling Groups
T3 burstable instances provide cost-effective baseline performance with burst capacity
Application presets select appropriate instance types (t3.micro for web, t3.small for databases)
VPC endpoints reduce latency and data transfer costs for S3/DynamoDB access
Multiple AMI options (Amazon Linux 2, Ubuntu, Windows) optimized for different workloads
User data scripts enable rapid instance bootstrapping and application deployment
T3 instance family provides lowest-cost option for variable workloads ($10-35/month)
Single-AZ VPC option eliminates unnecessary NAT gateway costs for dev environments
Optional NAT gateway deployment reduces costs when outbound internet not required
VPC endpoints eliminate data transfer charges for S3 and DynamoDB access
Burstable performance instances accumulate credits during idle periods for burst workloads
Flexible VPC modes allow using existing infrastructure to avoid duplication costs
T3 instances use AWS Nitro System for improved resource efficiency and lower power consumption
Burstable instances reduce over-provisioning by rightsizing to actual workload needs
Single-instance nonprod design minimizes unnecessary resource consumption
Optional VPC creation prevents infrastructure duplication across projects
SSM enables instance management without additional bastion hosts or jump boxes

config_preset.title: Config Preset
config_preset.description: Get EC2 configuration preset, defaults to 'web-server'.

vpc_mode.title: VPC Mode
vpc_mode.description: Create new VPC infrastructure or use existing VPC
vpc_mode.cost_impact: $0/month (mode selection, VPC components have separate costs)

vpc_id.title: Vpc Id
vpc_id.description: Get existing VPC ID if specified.

cidr_block.title: VPC CIDR Block
cidr_block.description: IPv4 CIDR block for new VPC (only if vpc_mode=new)

use_custom_cidr.title: Use Custom CIDR
use_custom_cidr.description: Enable to specify a custom IPv4 CIDR block for the new VPC

subnet_id.title: Subnet Id
subnet_id.description: Get existing subnet ID if specified.

enable_nat_gateway.title: Enable NAT Gateway
enable_nat_gateway.description: Provides internet access for private subnets (required for private instance internet access)

enable_flow_logs.title: Enable VPC Flow Logs
enable_flow_logs.description: Capture network traffic logs for security and troubleshooting (stored in S3)

enable_s3_endpoint.title: Enable S3 VPC Endpoint
enable_s3_endpoint.description: Free gateway endpoint for private S3 access (no internet traffic, no data transfer charges)

enable_dynamodb_endpoint.title: Enable DynamoDB VPC Endpoint
enable_dynamodb_endpoint.description: Free gateway endpoint for private DynamoDB access

instance_name.title: Instance Name
instance_name.description: Get instance name, defaults to empty string if auto.

enable_ssm.title: Enable AWS Systems Manager
enable_ssm.description: Secure instance access without SSH keys via AWS Systems Manager Session Manager
enable_ssm.cost_impact: $0/month (SSM Session Manager is free, creates IAM role/profile)

enable_ssm_endpoints.title: Enable SSM VPC Endpoints
enable_ssm_endpoints.description: Private endpoints for SSM in isolated subnets without internet access (3 endpoints: ssm, ssmmessages, ec2messages)

enable_ssh_access.title: Enable SSH Access
enable_ssh_access.description: Create a security group for direct SSH/RDP access from your IP

instance_tenancy.title: Instance Tenancy
instance_tenancy.description: Get VPC instance tenancy, defaults to 'default'.

enable_dns_support.title: Enable Dns Support
enable_dns_support.description: Whether to enable DNS support for VPC, defaults to True.

enable_dns_hostnames.title: Enable Dns Hostnames
enable_dns_hostnames.description: Whether to enable DNS hostnames for VPC, defaults to True.

web_port.title: Web Port
web_port.description: Standard port for web traffic, defaults to 80.

app_port.title: App Port
app_port.description: Port for internal application services, defaults to 8080.

db_port.title: Db Port
db_port.description: Port for database connections, defaults to 5432.

log_destination_type.title: Log Destination Type
log_destination_type.description: Where to store flow logs, defaults to 'cloud-watch-logs'.

ssh_access_ip.title: Admin Access IP (SSH/RDP)
ssh_access_ip.description: Your public IP address to restrict management access.
ssh_access_ip.help_text: Archie recommends SSM by default, additionally or if you prefer SSH - Enter your public IP for direct access.

ssh_allowed_ips.title: Ssh Allowed Ips
ssh_allowed_ips.description: Get allowed IP ranges for SSH access.

availability_zones.title: Availability Zones
availability_zones.description: Get availability zones for the VPC.

ami_os.title: Operating System
ami_os.description: Operating system for the EC2 instance
ami_os.cost_impact: $0/month (OS choice, actual cost in instance type)

ami_id.title: Ami Id
ami_id.description: Get AMI ID, resolved from OS or custom value.

preset_ports.title: Preset Ports
preset_ports.description: Get open ports for the selected preset.

user_data.title: User Data
user_data.description: Get processed user data for the selected preset.

instances.title: Instances
instances.description:
Get array of instance configurations.
Supports both legacy single-instance and new multi-instance modes.

Returns:
    List of instance configuration dicts

application_preset.title: Application Preset
application_preset.description: Pre-configured application template with optimized instance type and security groups
application_preset.cost_impact: $0/month (preset selection, actual cost varies by instance type)

instance_count.title: Number of Instances
instance_count.description: Number of EC2 instances to create (1-5)

resources.name: ec2-{preset}-{project}-{environment}-{region_short}
resources.description: Instance resource

resources.name: {namer_iam_profile}
resources.description: InstanceProfile resource

resources.name: role-{service}-{project}-{environment}-{region_short}
resources.description: Role resource

resources.name: {project_name}--rule-{idx}
resources.description: SecurityGroupRule resource

resources.name: vpc-{project}-{environment}-{region_short}-{network_num}
resources.description: Virtual Private Cloud with CIDR {config_custom_cidr_block}, DNS support enabled

resources.name: igw-main-{project}-{environment}-{region_short}
resources.description: Internet Gateway providing public internet connectivity for the VPC

resources.name: isolatedsub-{project}-{environment}-{region_short}-{az_short}-{subnet_num}
resources.description: Private subnet for isolated tier workloads (CIDR: {isolated_cidr})

resources.name: privsub-{project}-{environment}-{region_short}-{az_short}-{subnet_num}
resources.description: Private subnet for private tier workloads (CIDR: {private_cidr})

resources.name: pubsub-{project}-{environment}-{region_short}-{az_short}-{subnet_num}
resources.description: Public subnet for public tier workloads (CIDR: {public_cidr})

resources.name: rt-isolated-{project}-{environment}-{region_short}
resources.description: Route table for isolated tier network traffic routing

resources.name: rt-private-{project}-{environment}-{region_short}
resources.description: Route table for private tier network traffic routing

resources.name: rt-public-{project}-{environment}-{region_short}
resources.description: Route table for public tier network traffic routing

resources.name: route-00000-{project}-{environment}-{region_short}-igw
resources.description: Route directing 0.0.0.0/0 traffic to Internet Gateway

resources.name: route-00000-{project}-{environment}-{region_short}-nat
resources.description: Route directing 0.0.0.0/0 traffic to NAT Gateway
resources.cost_impact_description: Shared NAT Gateway for private subnet internet access

resources.name: rta-isolated-{project}-{environment}-{region_short}-1
resources.description: Associates a route table with a subnet for traffic routing

resources.name: rta-private-{project}-{environment}-{region_short}-1
resources.description: Associates a route table with a subnet for traffic routing

resources.name: rta-public-{project}-{environment}-{region_short}-1
resources.description: Associates a route table with a subnet for traffic routing

resources.name: eip-{purpose}-{project}-{environment}-{region_short}-{az_short}
resources.description: Elastic IP address for NAT Gateway attachment

resources.name: nat-gw-{project}-{environment}-{region_short}-{az_short}
resources.description: NAT Gateway providing outbound internet access for private subnets
resources.cost_impact_description: Shared NAT Gateway for private subnet internet access

resources.name: vpce-dynamodb-{project}-{environment}-{region_short}-gw
resources.description: DYNAMODB Gateway VPC Endpoint for private DYNAMODB service access

resources.name: vpce-ec2messages-{project}-{environment}-{region_short}-if
resources.description: EC2MESSAGES Interface VPC Endpoint for private EC2MESSAGES service access

resources.name: vpce-rds-{project}-{environment}-{region_short}-if
resources.description: RDS Interface VPC Endpoint for private RDS service access

resources.name: vpce-s3-{project}-{environment}-{region_short}-gw
resources.description: S3 Gateway VPC Endpoint for private S3 service access

resources.name: vpce-ssm-{project}-{environment}-{region_short}-if
resources.description: SSM Interface VPC Endpoint for private SSM service access

resources.name: vpce-ssmmessages-{project}-{environment}-{region_short}-if
resources.description: SSMMESSAGES Interface VPC Endpoint for private SSMMESSAGES service access

resources.name: fl-{scope}-{project}-{environment}-{region_short}-{traffic}
resources.description: VPC Flow Logs capturing ALL network traffic to S3

resources.name: secg-access-{project}-{environment}-{region_short}
resources.description: Management access

resources.name: secg-access-{project}-{environment}-{region_short}
resources.description: Management access security group (SSH/RDP)

resources.name: secg-app-{project}-{environment}-{region_short}
resources.description: Security group for application tier

ingress.description: Alt app port from web tier

resources.name: secg-db-{project}-{environment}-{region_short}
resources.description: Security group for database tier

resources.name: secg-web-{project}-{environment}-{region_short}
resources.description: Security group for web tier (HTTP/HTTPS)

resources.name: s3-{purpose}-{project}-{environment}-{region_short}
resources.description: S3 bucket for VPC Flow Logs storage

resources.name: {bucket_name}-lifecycle
resources.description: S3 bucket lifecycle rules for automatic log retention and deletion
